agent.name: Maya Chen
agent.bio: Specializing in coastal California luxury condos and beach properties since 2014.

listings.description: Top-floor corner unit with panoramic ocean views, floor-to-ceiling windows, and a private 220 sqft balcony.
Renovated three-bedroom in a 2019 boutique building. Chef's kitchen, smart home, and rooftop access.
